message.content:
In the project at C:\Users\User\citedby-ai, for each of these view files, find the Props interface/type and list all required props:

1. views/v3/TrackedQueriesPage.tsx
2. views/v3/CitationDetailPage.tsx
3. views/v3/BenchmarkPage.tsx
4. views/v3/CalibrationPage.tsx

Just give me the interface Props for each, brief format.

content.text: I'll search for the Props interfaces in each of these view files.

content.content:
1→import React, { useMemo } from 'react'; 2→import { Sliders, RefreshCw, Database, Shield, Clock, AlertTriangle } from 'lucide-react'; 3→import type { User } from '../../types'; 4→import type { AIEngineId } from '../../types/v3-types'; 5→import { getCitationChecks } from '../../services/v3/citation-storage'; 6→ 7→interface Props { 8→ onBack: () => void; 9→ user: User | null; 10→} 11→ 12→const ENGINES: AIEngineId[] = ['chatgpt', 'perplexity', 'gemini']; 13→ 14→const ENGINE_META: Record = { 15→ chatgpt: { name: 'ChatGPT', icon: '🟢', color: '#10a37f' }, 16→ perplexity: { name: 'Perplexity', icon: '🔵', color: '#20b8cd' }, 17→ gemini: { name: 'Gemini', icon: '🟣', color: '#8b5cf6' }, 18→}; 19→ 20→// Simulated current weights (from config/engine-weights.ts, read-only view) 21→const SAMPLE_CRITERIA = [ 22→ { id: 'AEO-TECH-01', name: 'Temps de réponse serveur', weights: { chatgpt: 0.8, perplexity: 1.2, gemini: 1.0 } }, 23→ { id: 'AEO-TECH-02', name: 'Balises HTML structurées', weights: { chatgpt: 1.5, perplexity: 1.3, gemini: 1.4 } }, 24→ { id: 'AEO-SEM-01', name: 'Structure Answer-First', weights: { chatgpt: 1.8, perplexity: 1.6, gemini: 1.5 } }, 25→ { id: 'AEO-SEM-02', name: 'Hiérarchie de titres', weights: { chatgpt: 1.3, perplexity: 1.4, gemini: 1.2 } }, 26→ { id: 'AEO-CONT-01', name: 'Section FAQ', weights: { chatgpt: 2.0, perplexity: 1.5, gemini: 1.6 } }, 27→ { id: 'AEO-ENT-01', name: 'Identité d\'entité', weights: { chatgpt: 1.0, perplexity: 1.4, gemini: 1.8 } }, 28→ { id: 'AEO-DATA-01', name: 'Schema.org Organization', weights: { chatgpt: 0.8, perplexity: 1.0, gemini: 2.0 } }, 29→ { id: 'AEO-TRUST-01', name: 'Backlinks autoritaires', weights: { chatgpt: 1.2, perplexity: 1.8, gemini: 1.0 } }, 30→]; 31→ 32→const CalibrationPage: React.FC = ({ onBack, user }) => { 33→ const projectId = user?.id || 'default'; 34→ const checks = useMemo(() => getCitationChecks(projectId), [projectId]); 35→ const dataPoints = checks.length; 36→ const canCalibrate = dataPoints >= 50; 37→ 38→ return ( 39→
